special_mechanics.name: Dash
special_mechanics.description: New ability allowing characters to dash and perform dashing attacks or dashing jump attacks, similar to Captain Commando

special_mechanics.name: Behind Grab
special_mechanics.description: Player can grab enemies from behind and perform holding and throwing attacks

special_mechanics.name: Direction Lock
special_mechanics.description: Ability to move while keeping the direction the player is facing locked

special_mechanics.name: Command-Based Special Attacks
special_mechanics.description: Input-based special techniques similar to Street Fighter series

special_mechanics.name: Super Move Gauge
special_mechanics.description: Gauge that fills with regular attacks; when full allows powerful Super Move that consumes entire gauge. Gauge auto-empties if Super move not used within certain time period

tier_notes: Tier 2 - Empirical/Qualitative data only. Sources document game mechanics and features but provide no quantitative physics values (speeds, acceleration, gravity constants, etc.). Movement parameters are purely qualitative based on gameplay mechanics description.
sources_used: The Cutting Room Floor - Final Fight 3 (SNES)
